timeline.title: Early Life
timeline.story: Born into a society of deep inequality, he experienced discrimination that shaped his lifelong mission for justice.

timeline.title: Columbia University
timeline.story: Studied economics and law in the United States, where he developed his vision for social reform.

timeline.title: London School of Economics
timeline.story: Advanced his research in economics and law, becoming one of the most educated reformers of his time.

timeline.title: Constitution Drafting
timeline.story: As Chairman of the Drafting Committee, he led the creation of the Constitution of India.

timeline.title: Constitution Drafting
timeline.story: He continued refining the Constitution, ensuring justice, equality, and liberty for every citizen.

timeline.title: Constitution of India
timeline.story: The Constitution of India came into effect, laying the foundation for the world's largest democracy.
